rules.name: Brute Force Login
rules.description: Detects multiple failed login attempts from the same source IP and user within a time window.

rules.name: Password Spray
rules.description: Detects a single source IP attempting logins against multiple users.

rules.name: Suspicious PowerShell Encoded Command
rules.description: Detects PowerShell commands using encoded command execution patterns.

rules.name: Blocked Outbound Burst
rules.description: Detects high volume of blocked outbound network connections from a single host.

rules.name: High Data Egress
rules.description: Detects network flows with unusually high outbound data transfer.

rules.name: IOC Domain Match
rules.description: Detects DNS queries matching known malicious domains from IOC feed.

rules.name: IOC IP Match
rules.description: Detects network traffic to known malicious IP addresses from IOC feed.

rules.name: IOC Hash Match
rules.description: Detects files with SHA256 hashes matching known malicious hashes from IOC feed.

rules.name: File Modified
rules.description: Detects files whose current SHA256 hash differs from baseline.

rules.name: File Missing
rules.description: Detects files present in baseline but missing from current path.
